{{Quote|The Darkwalker leaders have the codes. Solon Gaw, Critolus Masse, and Marcus Gaw. They will not give up the codes without a fight.|[[Karl Eckener]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:RKE" />}}
'''Solon Gaw''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was an aegis guard for the criminal [[Darkwalkers|Darkwalker gang]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by an officer of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] during the [[Rescue of Karl Eckener|rescue]] of [[Karl Eckener]], who was held hostage by the Darkwalkers in their [[Darkwalker Cave (Theed)|cave]].<ref name="SWG:RKE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Solon Gaw appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:RKE" /> prior to the game's closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Solon Gaw was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]", a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
